commit_scope: Close primitive-registry drift for float_to_int and temp_dir, add process/usage host-resource channel options, add floor/north-star declarations to the native tool/channel Form surfaces, and name the physical sample receipts still missing from the channel loopback path.

local_validation.notes: Primitive registry drift is closed: validate_primitive_registry.py reports 201 natives and 201 registry rows, with 164 in-band verified and 37 carrier-declared. primitive-registry-band returns 63 across Go/Rust/TS. tool-channel-band returns 255 and includes processes/usage host-resource plans. channel-loopback-band returns 255 across Go/Rust/TS.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy behavior changes expected beyond documentation/proof surfaces.

phase_gate.gate: Primitive registry has no missing native rows, process/usage host-resource channels are explicit, and channel docs declare floor, north star, and missing physical sample receipts.
phase_gate.next: Extend scripts/hati_os_physical_lanes_probe.sh with the named missing physical samples: process/usage receipts, TTS/STT loopback, STT/TTS loopback, video generation/classification loopbacks, screen gesture receipt, GPS-on-device receipt, and multi-model comparison receipts.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Wellness no longer reports float_to_int or temp_dir primitive registry drift; process/usage host-resource channels are plannable; Form docs expose floor/north-star plus missing physical proof samples for the channel learning surface.
test_flows: Primitive registry drift gate compares kernel source to registry and passes.
Primitive registry band proves 201 rows, 164 in-band verifications, 37 carrier-declared rows, and category attestation.
Tool channel band proves processes and usage as explicit host-resource plans.
Channel loopback band still proves reciprocal and cross-modal loopback planning.
Fourth-kernel physical lane doc names missing sample receipts.
e2e_validation.summary: Local proof passes for primitive drift closure, host process/usage channel planning, and channel loopback planning. Physical proof gaps are named but not yet executed in this commit.
